statement.en: Regulatory Landslide Hazard Zoning in New Caledonia: Integrating Temporal Probability in a Quantitative Framework

proposer: Yannick Thiéry, Bastien Colas, Mathieu Mengin et al.

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: This is a 2026-dated preprint (future-published or speculative submission) describing a quantitative landslide hazard zoning framework. The core technical claims (temporal probability integration, regulatory zoning methodology) are empirically testable but the document itself appears not yet peer-validated. Classification as FLOWING reflects provisional/under-review status rather than established fact (TRUE) or refuted (FALSE).

ramanujanFormula.interpretation: 時間は地形の記憶を通して危機の層位を積み重ねていく。

visualGlyph.interpretation: 堆積する時間が斜面の不安定さを暴露し、確率の光が危機の深さを照らす。
